info.name: Workday Extend REST API
info.description:
RESTful APIs for building and managing Workday Extend applications, including app registration, deployment, configuration, and lifecycle management. Enables developers to create custom applications that integrate seamlessly with the Workday platform and extend its core functionality.

Contact Support:
 Name: Workday Developer Support

item.name: Workday Extend Retrieve a specific application version

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Extend application

request.description: Returns the details of a specific version of the Extend application, including its status, configuration schema, and changelog.

response.name: Successful response with the version details

item.name: Workday Extend Create a new application version

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Extend application

request.description: Creates a new version of the specified Extend application. The new version is created in draft status and must be published before deployment.

item.name: Workday Extend Deploy an Extend application

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Extend application

request.description: Initiates a deployment of the specified Extend application version to the target environment. The deployment process provisions resources and activates the application.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Extend application

request.description: Returns the details of a specific Workday Extend application including its metadata, configuration, deployment status, and version history.

item.name: Workday Extend Update an Extend application

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Extend application

request.description: Updates the metadata or configuration of an existing Workday Extend application. Only the fields provided in the request body are updated.

item.name: Workday Extend Delete an Extend application

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Extend application

request.description: Removes a Workday Extend application registration from the tenant. The application must be undeployed before deletion.

item.name: Workday Extend Register a new Extend application

request.description: Registers a new Workday Extend application within the tenant. The app definition includes metadata, permissions, and configuration schema.
